entry.title: Re: GUI Z Report in Fiori launch pad
entry.content: @SK24 I cannot give specific steps because our BASIS/Security team takes care of this aspect, but I can confirm that it can be done.

entry.title: /scwm/pi_cc_create Product has not been inventoried before
entry.content:
When we look at a product in Warehouse Management Monitor, it shows as having been completely counted yet when we execute /SCWM/PI_CC/CREATE using explanation mode, the product appears from the selection screen with message 

Product has not been inventoried before

Why would it should up here when in the WMM it says product was already counted?

entry.title: Re: Total Commitment Cost should not reduce after booking...
entry.content: Commitment costs are used in Budget Availability checking so the Commitment costs converts to Actual Cost.  You can run a purchasing report to see all PRs and POs assigned to a project either open or received to get the value you want.

entry.title: Re: [SAP BTP Onboarding Series]Joule – Getting Started with Document Grounding for Your SAP SFSF
entry.content: Great content..much detailed and helpful..thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP S4 HANA-EWM Quantity Classification in outbound process
entry.content:
Hello,

i hope this is still active. I am configuring a quantity classification PICK strategy in S4 EWM. I have 3 classifications, P(PAL), C(CAR) and 1(EA). This used to work until EWM 9.5, but when I tried this in S4 EWM, PAL is working fine, but for CAR, I always get a decimal carton quantity.

For example, the material has the following UOM: 

PAL = 100 EA

CAR = 10 EA

 

Delivery Quantity is 112 EA. Expectation is to split this into the following breakdown:

P = 100 EA (or 1PAL)

C= 10EA (or 1 CAR)

1 = 2 EA

The actual result is:

P = 100 EA (or 1PAL)

C = 12 EA (1.2 CAR)

I wonder why the CAR classification is getting the remaining 12 EA, when it should be getting 10EA only. Is it a standard bug?

Current Configuration

Packspec - I have 3 levels, EA, CAR and PAL. Each level has quantity classification active with condition record for task Creation (0WHT).

Process Type - WPT 2010 is set to rounding rule = 3 (round down to multiples of a unit)

Pick Strategy - I set 3 different search strategy for each classification

When I check the logs of WT creation, it correctly reads the configuration, but the remaining quantity is being assigned to CAR classification even if it has loose quantity intended for other search strategy.

I hope someone can enlighten.

entry.title: After Set TECO status i face error in cost transfer AUC to Fix asset
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Please tell me correct  Settlement Scenario .

1st i Set TECO status , i face error in cost transfer AUC to Fix asset

After remove TECO Status  cost successfully  transfer AUC to fix asset 

Please find Attached Error Screenshot

entry.title: Re: program to find the where used
entry.content:
Using the Transactional Code EWK1.

Example:

Step 1  :  goto -> EWK1 T-code

Step 2 :  type your customized smart-form name (assume that you don't know about corresponding driver program of that smartform) . see the below screen shot for your reference .

Step 3: once you typed relevant customized smart-form name then press find, press enter.

Step 4: it will directly navigate to another window, there you can easily find the relevant driver program for the corresponding smart-forms.

Note: Additionally, you can utilize this T-code to find the locations of FM and other items.

Regards,

Awais Syed

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified

I can see my certifications under the new page, but I do not see my professional certification. Will these be retired? or How could I contact to see these migrated into the new account?

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content: hey

entry.title: How to enable the HU label and Shipping HU label in the Business context (HANDLINGUNIT)?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

when creating custom fields for HUs, these fields are not available in the HU label and HU shipping label. We need some extra info to be printed on the labels.

The field  YY1_ProductPutawayIndi in Business Context: Handling Unit (HANDLINGUNIT) is enabled in multiple forms and the changes have been published.

When downloading the form and verifying it in Adobe LiveCycle designer, the field is only available for the packing list, not for the HU shipping label nor the Handling Unit label.

Should we do some additional actions for the label forms ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to enable the HU label and Shipping HU label in t...
entry.content:
You can create a custom field ‘Product Putaway Indicator’ in the Business Context: Handling Unit (HANDLINGUNIT) and enable it. However, please note that the availability of custom fields in forms depends on the business context of the custom field and the business context of the form.

In your case, the custom field is created in the business context ‘Handling Unit’, but the forms EWM_HU_LABEL and EWM_HU_SHPLABEL might not support this business context, which is why the custom field is not available in these forms.

You can consider creating a custom field with business context - Handling Unit, then determine the logic at /SCWM/EX4_OM_HU_EXTEND_HDR.

This BAdI is used to enhance the standard output of Handling Unit (HU) documents. You can extend the Adobe output forms of handling unit (HU) labels and HU shipping labels according to your business needs.

Please note that implementing this BAdI requires ABAP programming knowledge and should be done internally. Also, any changes should be thoroughly tested in a non-production environment before being transported to the production system.

For further information about this BAdI please check the document below:

Extensibility for Adobe Output Forms of HU Documents 

Hope this helps!

Anything let us know by here.

Best regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Is it possible to include validation expressions to "service workflow" steps?
entry.content:
Hi there!

The service workflow defined with our client consists of 5 steps:

  1. Open the activity to view general information,
  2. Travel to the customer,
  3. Capture photos,
  4. Perform the work and fill out the mandatory smarform,
  5. Checkout and close the activity.

service workflow

The problem I am reporting refers to step 1, that is, when the technician opens the activity he "can fill in the smartform". I don't want this to happen, I want the smartform to only be filled in at work execution stage - step 4.

After opening a case in SAP for Me, they told me to go to the screen configuration (activity details on mobile apps) and then change the visibility of smartform card to hidden. I did, but the smartform is always hidden and cannot be filled out.

Is it possible to include a validation expression in advanced settings so that the smartform can only be viewed and edited in the work step?

Thanks in advance for your attention and I'll really appreciate your response. 😉

entry.title: OData - ETag Handling in Batch Processing
entry.content:
In OData implementation for batch processing, a changeset might contain multiple CUD (CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE) operations. This can be problematic in combination with eTags because one operation can change data that is about to be processed by consecutive operations. In this case, eTags of these operations might not be valid anymore. You have to redefine the changeset methods and enable defer mode. When using defer mode the automatic eTag check will be done for all operations before any operations have been processed.

Please refer to the below SAP documents for more details on ETag handling in batch processing. 

Reference  https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_750/68bf513362174d54b58cddec28794093/88f15067179140098ee6fc4354f7860d.html?version=7.5.16

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_750/68bf513362174d54b58cddec28794093/94a126519eff236ee10000000a445394.html?version=7.5.16

#NW ABAP Gateway (OData)  #OData

entry.title: Public Cloud: fiscalization in Croatia: how to link a charging device to a user
entry.content: In Croatia's fiscalization solution, the fiscal number range is determined by a charging device. The charging device is pulled from the user parameter /CCEE/FISC_CD. At least, this is how it works in an S4H on-premise. There is no possibility to set this user parameter in S4H Public Cloud. How can the charging device be predefined in S4H Public Cloud?

entry.title: Re: Import Goods Movement Goods Issue from excel
entry.content:
Hi Ariel,

Would recommend you provide some more detail about the process you want address. For example, is this manufacturing ? Delivery Management?

Assume you are referring to the legacy app: https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/index.html#/detail/Apps('MIGO_GI')/S32

There may be a new Fiori based app or the GI might be embedded in the best practice. For example: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/aff0b3f5f46c42a2b2c0fabfc233bab2/64f81a71edf5490ab522a829be075827.html?locale=en-US

 

If you need to do mass postings, it is typically recommended to investigate the use of an api such as https://api.sap.com/api/API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV/overview

Thank you
Jerry

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative May 2024 Bootcamp Guide
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I am excited to apply for the digital skills initiative program, which aligns with my career goals and passion for process automation. 
 
As a Planner EAM responsible for maintaining master data in SAP PM, I recognize the importance of upskilling to remain relevant in the industry. This program offers a unique opportunity to enhance my skills in automation, enabling me to drive efficiency and innovation in my current role.
 
Moreover, it will expand my career prospects and open up new avenues for growth. I am eager to be part of this program and leverage the skills and knowledge gained to make a meaningful impact in my organization and the industry.
 
Regards 
Mitch

entry.title: Re: SAP Learning
entry.content: Bannu - With the SAP leaning you will get lot of resources and SAP Learning Hub is a digital learning solution that supports learners in building and maintaining SAP software skills. It provides guided, expert-led, and hands-on learning opportunities to enable up skilling across the SAP solution portfolio. In case of Ariba you can still try to create free account to explore the functionality though it will be limited but you will be able to get some hands on.

Can you please suggest what can be the reason or where can I find the reason of this behavior? 

Thanks and Regards,

AP

just check a few example.

entry.title: how to transport an ambient ui5 application
entry.content:
hello to all
I have some beginner doubts.
context:
I created a ui5 application in SAP BAS and did the deploy-to-abap to the ERP DEV environment.
Once the deploy is done, I transport the application to QAS.
My doubts are:
Is it ok what I did?
Is it possible to deploy directly to QAS?
When transporting from environments, what should I include in the transport TO?

Also, I must say that when I do this, the application only works in DEV and not in QAS. When I do a "test service" to the application from the trx SICF in DEV, the application opens correctly. But if I do the same in QAS, the application opens a white screen in the browser and says "file not found".

entry.title: How to compensate A/R Down Payment Invoice and A/P Invoice with different currencies in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm facing an issue where I've created an A/R Down Payment Invoice in dollars. When I try to compensate the document by linking it with an A/P Invoice in COP (Colombian Pesos), the system returns the following message: "You cannot choose the 'Total Down Payment' 'Browse' button; first create a down payment."

However, when I try to use the A/P Invoice with the same currency, the Down Payment Invoice shows up in the list. 

The client SAP version is: SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.220) SP 2308 (64-bit).

Is it possible to compensate these documents with different currencies?

 

Best Regards, 

Henrique de Castro Machado

entry.title: Re: PO versioning in CIG component
entry.content: Hi KlugS - Ideally PO has Type of request: new (default), update, or delete. Update and delete orders must use the DocumentReference element with the payloadID to refer to the original purchase order. When you cancel it creates a PO with the incremental version because of that only. Could you share the error message what you are receiving in CIG? Is it from ISMG or SBN?

entry.title: Re: Setting a Default Value for Filter in Fiori Elements using Annotations
entry.content: Hi Pablo, Would you be able to share the details/steps of your solution that worked? I have a similar requirement but for a filter field that can accept multiple values. The possible values would be dynamic. It could be one value or a hundred of them. These values may come from a db table linked to the current user. Pls advise. Thanks.

This is my fisrt time implementing rebates in S4HANA and I have a question. Is it possible to define who can aprove the settlement based in the ammount? Just like a release strategy.

I know this post is a little old, but I would appreciate if you could help me.

 

Regards,

Lisbeth

entry.title: OData Upsert Response in French as opposed to English
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am trying to investigate if we can dictate the language in which SuccessFactors returns a response to CPI. 

I am currently working on an interface where I fetch data from SF via a GET call using the Odata v2 adapter. The response received in this case is in English.

However, when I upsert with a POST call via an OData v2 adapter. I get the response in French. 

I tried testing this via Postman and in this scenario, via an HTTP call, I got the response in English. The same with CPI when I change the adapter from HTTP to Odata v2, I get the response back in English.

With the Odata v2 adapter, I tried sending the headers: Accept-Language: en also sap-language en but I still got the response back in French. Has anyone experienced this or found a way to resolve it?

Any input is appreciated. 

Response Received from CPI above

Response received from Postman.

Regards,

Amrit

entry.title: Re: OData Upsert Response in French as opposed to English
entry.content:
You could add a query parameter sap-language=en.  However, it would be odd for the language to be different based on the client if you are logging in with the same account.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: OData Upsert Response in French as opposed to English
entry.content: Thanks Ryan, appreciate your time and input. Yes, the same set of credentials acting up differently on postman and cpi and between get and post calls. I did try passing the header you suggested

entry.title: How to authenticate users while consuming APIs in Ariba
entry.content:
Hi,

I have activated an API in Ariba and got application key, client id and secret. I can call the API using Postman and get the response back.

One of my colleague, who doesn't have access to Ariba can also consume the API and get the results back.

Our requirement is to authenticate the user and check the user roles by the system before provide the results back only if user is authorized to access that specific data.

For example, if user has authorization to display only PRs, but not POs in Ariba system and if the user try to consume the API to retrieve PO related data, system should give an error message saying that user does not have access to PO data

Can you please provide some guidance on this requirement.

Thanks,

Sagar.

entry.title: Re: SAP SAC - can't use objects from another page in script
entry.content:
Hi there

 

Not sure if this is a good solution, it isn't exactly pretty...

For Filters I can't help much but for Variables you can work around it as follows:

On Page 1 (where your chart is not there) do the following steps:

1. Create a simple KPI tile with a single value from the same Query you want to change.

2. In the Chart properties (right panel) set the Data refresh of the new chart to "Always Pause"

3. In the Outline (left panel) disable mouse actions and make the chart invisible.

4. Define your variable using the hidden chart chtHIDDENCHART.getDataSource().setVariableValue("VARNAME", "VARVALUE");

5. This will update the Variables linked to the Query it is sharing so when you go the the page the Variables are set before the report runs.

 

Not sure if there is a better way to update Story Filters/Variable directly but this worked for me

entry.title: Extension Memory for PRD
entry.content:

We need to increase the memory on a server in SAP Rise which lives in AWS, the question is how to do this increase, that is, is the change made to the next model of family available in AWS or can only the memory be increased? Sagar

entry.title: S4HANA rebate settlement
entry.content:
Hi everybody, 

I would like to know if it's possible to create a entry service sheet or a purchase order instead of a credit note in a rebate settlement in S4HANA. The problem we've got is that, after three months, it is not possible to generate a credit note based in an invoice because of fiscal policies here. In these cases, the company asks customers a purchase order to pay the rebate ammount. 

Thanks for your help.

1) Standard/Workplace Address, 

2) Home Address and

3) Business Address. 

Which tables are filled and how? How does it look on the screen in BP? For which addresses I have to create relationships and how?

Hi Margit,

Where can we find C_HDBADM Learning Journey as I was only able to find C_DBADM, which is only 1/3 of C_HANATEC?

Example:
The following courses are prerequisites to become C_HANATEC_19 certified in the area of
SAP HANA database system administration:
● HA100 - SAP HANA 2.0 SPS07 – SAP HANA - 360° Introduction
● HA200 - SAP HANA 2.0 SPS07 – Installation and Administration
● HA201 - SAP HANA 2.0 SPS07 – High Availability and Disaster Tolerance Administration
● HA215 - SAP HANA 2.0 SPS07 – Using Monitoring and Performance Tools
● HA250 - SAP HANA 2.0 SPS07 – Database Migration using DMO

Thanks
BR

Daniel

entry.title: Re: How to implement Value-Help in Input-Field for RAP OD...

entry.title: Re: calculation in final internal table in amdp class
entry.content:
@winona86 

If you consume the procedures from ABAP, use the read text there.
If you consume it in a fiori app you can also use a custom entity so you can fill an element with read_text.

Otherwise for the long text to be available on hanadb:
A. You can use an enhancement to store the text in a readable format, in a custom table.
B. Use SLT to transform the text. 

For me, the easiest option is the first, if possible.

I also tried creating BIT directly using fkkbixbit_cwb, still dependent item did not generate when i moved it to billable status.

Please help, it is urgent.

entry.title: Re: E-mail Notification for PR/PO Approver in SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hello @mickaelquesnot 

Very good post, but I can't access to video. Is possible that can you publish video again?

I can not access the video, when I click on the YouTube link shows the message "Video Unavilable This Video is No Longer Available Best The Uploader Has Closed Their YouTube Account." Can you publish it again?

Thank you

entry.title: How to distribute manufacturing costs to Cost Center?
entry.content:
We would like to distribute manufacturing costs in Event-based scenario to Cost Centers and understand the process for it.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to distribute manufacturing costs to Cost Center?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


In some production scenarios you can allocate manufacturing costs to a non-material (non-MAT) receiver like cost center, WBS element, and order instead of material inventory.


In this case, in event-based production cost posting, WIP capitalization is not relevant for manufacturing orders without settlement to material. Therefore, for these orders, costs allocated from goods issue or confirmation will be passed immediately to the defined non-MAT receiver (cost center, WBS element, or order). The following posting is made:

  • Consumption on non-MAT receiver is debited.

  • Consumption on manufacturing order is credited.

If the goods delivery is posted, the costs will be deduced in the non-MAT receiver, and the following posting will be made:

  • Consumption on manufacturing order is debited.

  • Consumption on non-MAT receiver is credited.

Event-based cost distribution is status-independent and will be posted at every goods issue, confirmation, or goods receipt. Therefore, the total actual costs of the manufacturing order is always 0.


Kindly check the below SAP Help Portal documentation for more details:

Event-Based Cost Distribution Posting (non-MAT Receivers)


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: /IMO/BWCONTENT not found in SWF5
entry.content: Hello, Have you checked SAP Note https://me.sap.com/notes/2257232/E which mentions the required BI_CONT version/SP levels for the business function to be available for activation? Thanks, Kishan

entry.title: Re: Monitoring purchase order with status error
entry.content:
Hello,

You can setup Business Process Monitoring (BPM) via Solution Manager on the specific KPI related to Purchase Orders in blocked/error status. Based on this monitoring, subsequent alerts/notifications can be configured.

More details in links below:

Business Process Monitoring | SAP Help Portal

SAP Solution Manager

Regards, Kishan

entry.title: Re: BTP CI-Invalid request received by HTTP proxy: An HTT...
entry.content:
Hello Sateesh,

May I request you to check SAP Note 3146809 - Error "HTTP header is larger than 8192 bytes" using Cloud Integration HTTP Receiver Adapter to connect with a S/4HANA Cloud System - SAP for Me and see if only the required request headers are configured. Removing any unwanted headers may help bring down the header size to <8Kb.

Regards, Kishan

entry.title: Architecting Complex Workflows Real time scenarios with SAP Build Process Automations
entry.content:
Introduction

Welcome to our SAP Blog series on SAP Build Process Automation!

My colleague, Adwait, and I have collaborated on numerous customer engagements, encountering a wide array of challenges related to complex workflow development.

In this series, we aim to address some of the most demanding real-world requirements and provide comprehensive end-to-end solutions.

Initial Thoughts

SAP Build Process Automation represents a significant evolution from the traditional SAP Workflow Management service. With a blend of professional code and low-code/no-code options, it promises a new era of workflow development.

Initially, we harboured doubts—could complex workflows truly be built using low-code and no-code approaches? However, our experiences have pleasantly surprised us 😀

SAP Build Process Automation empowers us to tackle even the most challenging Real-Time Business Scenarios effortlessly.

Target Audience: SAP BTP Architect, BTP Developer & Solution Architect.

Pre-Requisite: As we delve into complex real-time requirements, we recommend that you prepare by gaining an initial understanding of SAP BTP Build Process Automation. Familiarize yourself with the basics and consider practicing some exercises to ensure a smooth journey through this series.

Business Requirements

Throughout this blog series, we will delve into the following critical business requirements:

Deadline Monitoring, :  Auto Approval/Rejection

    • Invoke Sub Process with timer event for elapsing time line.
    • How to utilize the SAP Build Process Automation API to complete the task.
    • How to control the main process ( workflow)S from the Sub workflows and many more.

Dynamic Sequential Multi-Level Approval

    • Design the complex decision matrix with multi-level approval.
    • Implementing sequential approvals across multiple organizational levels.

Conclusion Remarks:

Thank you for reading, and happy automating! 

Please feel free to get in touch with me ( Mohit Bansal) & Adwait 

 

Regards,

Mohit Bansal, SAP BTP Advisory & Solution Architect

entry.title: CCM: How add field to table VWB2_VBRKVBRP_1
entry.content:
Hi,

We need the field VSBED to be added to business volume table VWB2_VBRKVBRP_1 because we get an error when running tx WB2R_BUSVOL. The field has already been added to structure WB2_S_BVB_FIELDCAT. Please advise how to get field VSBED in the business volume table.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to connect to RISE using saprouter over Azure?
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, Site-to-Site IPSEC VPN between on-premise and RISE Azure is supported. The customer should be able to connect in a similar manner as they do now. Please see below blogs which details all connectivity options between on-premises and RISE hyper scalars.

RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition : Sec... - SAP Community

Network connectivity options in Azure with SAP RISE | Microsoft Learn

Regards, Kishan

entry.title: Re: Custom fields and Custom logic in settlement management
entry.content: Hi, please elaborate on the solution for this issue

entry.title: Re: CCM: How add field to table VWB2_VBRKVBRP_1
entry.content:
Hi @jb123, 

VWB2_VBRKVBRP_1 is a standard CDS view, I would not recommend to enhance it. 
You can create your own CDS view and add the logic for VBAK-VSBED field if you want to use this field for business volume selection criteria. 
 
If you need this field for pricing calculation, adding it to the CDS view will not be enough and further development will be required.  
  
Regards,
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Re: CCM: How add field to table VWB2_VBRKVBRP_1
entry.content: OK, thanks. VSBED is used in a condition table / access sequence for a contract type to calculate accruals.

entry.title: Threshold for data store in Cloud Integration
entry.content: Our integration package published in API Hub contains integration flows that uses data store. For instance in one of the data stores we are saving the absence records in order to determine based on the unique external ID if a particular absence record has been updated in SuccessFactors Employee Central. As we are dealing with customers having huge population the demand to keep all the absence records in anticipation of any updates to them raises a potential concern with the data store collapsing or failing due to large amount of data. Though we have a tool to perform clean up of the data store we would like to know the limit of the data store like threshold in terms of file size so that we can make a decision in terms of how to manage it. Also, any advise to deal with our case is much appreciated as we need to at least keep all the absence records in the data store for at least a year.

entry.title: Re: change "valid to" field in Profit Center master collectively
entry.content: Hello, sorry for ask, how to make LSMW for mass change valid to profit and cost center?

entry.title: Re: New asset accounting activation in S4/HANA
entry.content: Yes. Entry was missing in table TFAAD_BSN_FUNC. I ran transaction FAA_DOACTIVATION to change activation option to “Active”. gave client number, and executed. Table was updated and New Asset Accounting was activated.

entry.title: How to upload PR items through excel to My purchase requisitions app in S/4 public cloud?
entry.content:
I want to create PR and mass upload PR items to "My purchase requisitions" or "Manage purchase requisitions" app by using excel and postman app. 

After creating the PR, it will go for approvals as per the PR workflow. After it is fully approved, it should auto convert to PO, auto GR/IR and directly go to the payment with no manual intervention.

Point to note: We are not using material in PR but the short text to enter line items. Therefore, there won't be any product master data or purchasing info. record changes possible to automate PR to PO.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: Report for incoterms and sales order
entry.content:
Hi All i want to run a report which will show incoterm and customer name.

how to convert delivery note in spreadsheet.

entry.title: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – How and Why to Upgrade SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA 2023 or Higher
entry.content:
Did you know?

There has been a significant change in the options for updating your SAP Fiori front-end server version for your SAP S/4HANA system starting from SAP S/4HANA 2023.

There is a strict dependency enforced between your SAP S/4HANA release and your SAP Fiori version.  This means:

  • You can only upgrade SAP Fiori by upgrading SAP Fiori as part of a full-stack upgrade of your SAP S/4HANA release.

Of course:

  • You can still patch SAP Fiori within your current SAP S/4HANA release.

Worth Knowing: SAP Fiori is technically implemented via the SAPUI5 framework. SAPUI5 Major / minor version is explained in the SAPUI5 SDK section Versioning and Maintenance of SAPUI5.  SAPUI5 uses a three-number version identifier, for example, 1.120.15. The numbers have the following meaning:

  • The first part (1) specifies the release number (major version).
  • The second part (120) specifies the version number (minor version).
  • The third part (15) specifies the patch number.

Options for upgrading SAP Fiori from SAP S/4HANA 2023

From SAP S/4HANA release 2023, you can only update your SAP Fiori – i.e. the SAPUI5 major and/or minor version - as part of a SAP S/4HANA upgrade.

For example:

  • Upgrade from an earlier SAP S/4HANA release to the SAP S/4HANA 2023 release or higher - such as a full stack upgrade from SAP S/4HANA 2021 FPS01 to SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02
  • Upgrade to a higher FPS of the SAP S/4HANA 2023 release - such as a full stack upgrade from SAP S/4HANA Initial Shipment Stack to SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02
  • Upgrade from SAP S/4HANA 2023 to a higher SAP S/4HANA release - such as a full stack upgrade from SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 to SAP S/4HANA 2025 FPS01

 

 

A full stack upgrade is the recommended approach for SAP S/4HANA 2023 and all higher releases.

Within your current SAP S/4HANA release, you can – and should! – update SAP Fiori by applying patches. This means you can still update your SAPUI5 patch number.

The advantage of patching is you will:

  • Gain minor feature improvements possible in your current SAP S/4HANA release
  • Apply fixes for known and already resolved issues

 

Good times to patch SAP Fiori are:

  • Immediately on install of your new SAP S/4HANA release
  • Immediately after upgrade to a new SAP S/4HANA release
  • For long-running projects, to minimize rediscovering known & already resolved issues, it can make sense to patch up before User Acceptance Testing.
  • When needed to resolve a critical incident. For example, when advised by SAP Support to apply a patch as part of resolution of a SAP Incident.

For the strategy refer to the section Upgrade Options in

SAP Fiori deployment options and SAP Fiori front-end server strategy - UPDATE 2023 and the linked document SAP Fiori deployment options and system landscape recommendations

For the detailed information on how to update, refer to the central note:

SAP Note 2217489 - Maintenance and Update Strategy for SAP Fiori Front-End Server

You should also check the fine detail in the SAP Fiori front-end server release information note for your SAP S/4HANA release. For example, for SAP S/4HANA 2023, you should refer to:

SAP Note 3340880 - SAP Fiori front-end server 2023 for SAP S/4HANA

 

How is this different from SAP S/4HANA 2022 and earlier releases

 

In SAP S/4HANA 2022 there were 2 additional options for a delta upgrade of SAP Fiori that made it possible to run a higher SAP Fiori version against a lower SAP S/4HANA release.

You had delta upgrade options such as:

  • Platform Upgrade
    • You could upgrade your SAP Fiori front-end server. For example, you could upgrade to SAP Fiori FES 2022 with release SAP S/4HANA 1909.
  • FES Only Upgrade
    • You could technically upgrade only the SAP Fiori UI components for FES. For example, you could upgrade your SAP Fiori version from 1.71 to 1.108 with release SAP S/4HANA 1909.

These options were described in How and why to upgrade SAP Fiori for your SAP S/4HANA solution.

While some customers did manage to make these changes, in practice they complicated support, required considerable regression testing, caused undesirable side-effects, and complicated upgrades. For example, side-effect issues with some apps – such as My Inbox and Custom CDS Views – in the software component UIBAS001 as described in SAP Note 2436567 - UI for Basis Applications - General Information

From SAP S/4HANA 2023 these delta upgrade options are no longer supported.

Summary of upgrade options from SAP S/4HANA 2023 compared to earlier SAP S/4HANA releases:

 

 

Becoming a SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA guru

You’ll find much more on our  SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA topic page

Other helpful links:

  • See all questions and answers about SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA 
  • Follow SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA for more blogs and updates 
  • Ask a Question about SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA

Brought to you by the SAP S/4HANA RIG and Customer Care team.

entry.title: Re: Import Goods Movement Goods Issue from excel

They don't want to input data one by one because of the data to input is too many. So we can use the API for this case ? Thankyou!

entry.title: Re: Best Practices for SAP Analytics Cloud CSV and Excel export performance
entry.content:
Hi Rui,

I am not aware of a way to export a table (from SAC story) into several csv files, with a fixed number of rows in each file.

Please feel free to submit an improvement request through SAP Analytics Cloud Continuous Influence site here.

Thank you,
Radim

entry.title: How to block Sales Order and Delivery when the previous AR Invoice Transaction is not yet paid
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Im writing and developing a code for my Transaction Notification yet i cant figure it out anyone can help me, this is the details :

I want to Block the Sales Order and Delivery with the following condition
1. If there are previous AR Invoice(Last Transaction) are not paid
2. If the last Delivery of the customer is not yet copied or encoded to AR Invoice.
3. if Due date + 10 Days has past from the due of the invoice

entry.title: Re: Import Goods Movement Goods Issue from excel
entry.content:
HI @Arielgwyn , They can also consider the apps like Confirm Production Operation which allows them to do scanning of barcodes.

As it is production order related (or process order, there is an API for that too), they can also consider the API Production Order Confirmation https://api.sap.com/api/API_PROD_ORDER_CONFIRMATION_2_SRV/overview

Where they can also log the time ticket, goods movement, etc.

I hope this helps.

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: DELETE_ENTITY calling GET_ENTITYSET in MDK?
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, MDK currently will perform a GET before calling DELETE. So, it's required that your Entity Set has GET implemented.

BR

entry.title: Migration of SD - Condition Records for Free Goods
entry.content:
Hi Members, 

I am migrating the condition records for free goods using the SD - Condition Records for Free Goods Migration Object in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition. During the migration, I need to input the condition table number for the condition type YA00 - Free Goods SD. However, I couldn't find the condition table number for the mentioned condition type in the system.

Then, when I simulate the migration project, it says, "For condition type YA00 and table 004, there are no valid access sequences."

I'm trying to find the KB but couldn't find any. Please help me with where I can check the condition table number and access sequence for the condition type YA00 - Free Goods SD.

Thanks.

Kenny

entry.title: Bitget 추천코드: "wgiw":- 거래수수료 50% 할인을 받으세요
entry.content:
비트겟 추천코드란 무엇인가요? "wgiw"과 같은 Bitget 추천 코드는 신규 사용자가 Bitget 계정을 만들 때 다양한 보너스를 제공하는 특별 프로모션 코드입니다. 신규 회원을 위한 쿠폰 코드와 같은 역할을 합니다. 회원가입시 추천코드를 이용하시면 회원가입 보너스, 거래수수료 할인, 깜짝 보상이 있는 미스터리 박스 등의 혜택을 누리실 수 있습니다.

 

2024년 최고의 Bitget 추천코드는 무엇인가요? 2024년 가장 추천하는 Bitget 추천코드는 "wgiw"입니다. 등록 시 이 코드를 사용하면 넉넉한 $100 보너스를 받으실 수 있습니다. 또한 귀하의 추천 코드를 다른 사람들과 공유하면 상당한 50% 커미션을 받을 수 있습니다. 이를 통해 환영 보너스로 최대 1,000 USDT를 축적할 수 있습니다. 이는 추가 혜택으로 거래 경험을 시작하는 동시에 다른 사람들이 가입하여 자신의 보상을 받도록 장려하는 좋은 방법입니다.

 

비트겟 추천 추천코드란 무엇인가요? Bitget 추천코드 "wgiw"을 입력하시면 거래수수료 50% 할인을 받으실 수 있습니다. 이를 활용하려면: 1. Bitget에 새 계정을 등록하세요. 2. 가입시 Bitget 추천코드 "wgiw"을 사용하세요.

entry.title: Re: SAP ByD: Is it possible to do budget reporting withou...
entry.content:
Hi Rami.

We upload our budgets through the work center 'Cost and Revenue' and then select the planning option. You can export a blank excel template and upload your budgets with a year and a name, and if you wish, multiple different versions.  

There a number of financial reports that then enable you to run an Actual vs Budget report and you can tell it what budget version you wish to use.

I dont know if we have active budget turned on, I dont even know what that is, but from your description, i cant imagine we do.

Regards

David

entry.title: Re: Use TypeScript with the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model
entry.content: Thanks @KevinR for sharing your experience.  I'm glad you are getting into TypeScript!  Readers might also like to check out a blog series I wrote last year, Why the TypeScript Sheriff has come to clean up your JavaScript

entry.title: Re: BTP CI-Invalid request received by HTTP proxy: An HTT...
entry.content:
Hi Kishan. Thank you for your input. yes I already read it. This SAP Note is relevant  for HTTP Receiver Adapter and not for OData Receiver Adapter.

and exception is also littel different than this note exception : Invalid request received by HTTP proxy: An HTTP line is larger than 8192 bytes

The actual issue is, upto some level only  I could able to use the entities to retrieve info from API, if I added addtional entities, I get this error.
If the issue is limitations of size, then where to and how to extend size ?

 

 

Thank you 

Sateesh

entry.title: Configuring SF EC to ERP Mapping Without Location Group using BIB
entry.content:
Understanding the Challenge

Traditionally, we use standard Business Integration Builder (BIB) tool for configuring employee replication where ERP's Personnel Area is linked to SF EC's Location Group, and ERP's Personnel Subarea is linked to SF EC's Location. However, many customers nowadays opt not to create a Location Group field in SF EC. This omission complicates ERP configuration since Personnel Area remains a mandatory field.

Implementing the Solution

To overcome this challenge effectively, we may think implementing a Business Add-In (BADI) becomes essential. This BADI allows us to update ERP's Personnel Area when there's no direct mapping from SF EC's Location Group and Personnel Subarea fields.

Due to the need for additional development work, the overall implementation timeline may increase. This is primarily because the BADI implementation involves designing and testing custom logic to handle data mappings effectively.

But we can handle this in the standard configuration without BADI using a generic conversion rule.

  1. Identify the Requirement: Recognize the need to establish a mapping solution between SF EC's Location and ERP's Personnel Area/Subarea due to the absence of a Location Group field in SF EC.
  2. Configure BIB: Adjust the existing BIB configuration to accommodate the new mapping logic. Since there's no Location Group in SF EC, reconfigure the mapping to directly link SF EC's Location to ERP's Personnel Subarea.

Practical Example: Mapping Personnel Area and Subarea

Let's illustrate this with a practical example scenario:

  • Scenario: SF EC does not have a Location Group field.
  • Objective: Ensure ERP's Personnel Area and Subarea fields are correctly populated based on SF EC's Location field.

Personnel Subarea Mapping:

In this case, SF EC locations are defined as 1001, 1002, 1011, and 1012. Since the values of Personnel Subarea and Location are identical, no additional value mapping updates are necessary initially. However, if there are changes in either system's values, updating the mapping becomes crucial.

 

Personnel Area Mapping:

To map ERP's Personnel Area (WERKS), identify a field that isn't currently used for mapping purposes in SF EC and map that field to WERKS in ERP.

  • Utilize a generic value conversion rule (e.g., Replace with String/EC Field) to pass SF EC's Location field values to ERP's Personnel Area field (e.g., corporation field).

  • Example: If SF EC's Location field is 1001, it maps directly to ERP's corresponding field WERKS as 1001.

Updating Value Mapping:

It's imperative to update the value mapping for the Personnel Area field. Establish a mapping where SF EC's Location field values serve as the EC key, linking them to the corresponding Personnel Area values in ERP based on your enterprise structure configuration.

Please find the results of our configuration in verbose log.

Conclusion

In conclusion, adapting to the absence of a Location Group field in SF EC requires a strategic approach. By adjusting the BIB configuration, you ensure seamless integration between SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central and ERP systems. This setup not only resolves integration challenges but also enhances flexibility in managing system configurations based on evolving customer needs.

By following these steps and examples, you can effectively configure SF EC to ERP mappings even in scenarios where traditional field mappings might not be available, ensuring smooth and reliable data synchronization across your enterprise systems.

entry.title: Re: Replication of Quotations from 3rd part systems to SA...
entry.content:
Dear Hemanth,

You can use the External Events to trigger transactional emails like Quotation creation and use the Events API to create automation programs and also the attributes within that event can be used to make decisions within the automation program and also to personalize the content as required.

Events:: External events – Emarsys

Hope this helps.

Regards,
Saravanakumar M

entry.title: Re: how to transport an ambient ui5 application
entry.content:
Hi there,

Deploying to DEV and then transporting it to your environment is normally the way to go. Technically it is possible to deploy to QAS, but you will get mismatches in objects. I strongly recommend you use the default transport way.

Could you give some more details about your application? Does it use shared resources, do you have your namespace and references set properly in your manifest? Do you have a reference to sapui5 lib? It could be that your QAS system is not exactly the same as your DEV environment, as an example check if all services are running properly (SICF on gateway).

From your screenshot I can see you are using a standalone SAPUI5 app, so your reference in your index.html file could be wrong (to sapui5 lib). If this is correct, check out the SICF services if they are up and running.

Bear in mind that SSL certificate is also not valid (https). Also in your url you are using a client, is this client available on QAS? For a more user friendly way of presenting a technical url (port, client and so on), please let your team have a look at the web dispatcher too.

Kind regards,

Noël

entry.title: The Phemex Invitation Code 2024: "J6JLA5":- Best Bonus 2024
entry.content:
The Phemex referral code "J6JLA5" is specifically designated for new users to Phemex. If you already have an account, unfortunately, you cannot use this referral code to benefit from its associated rewards. However, you can still actively participate in the referral program by inviting new users to join Phemex using your unique referral link or code.
